No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also explicitly aims to foster appreciation of cultural diversity (Target 4.7), a key component of sustainable development education.

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Developing Turkish language skills and the ability to participate in international affairs can indirectly improve employment prospects, aligning with Target 8.5 on productive employment.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course fosters appreciation of diverse cultures ('鑑賞多元文化之能力'), which promotes intercultural understanding and can help reduce inequalities based on origin, aligning with Target 10.2.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Fostering intercultural communication and appreciation of diverse cultures ('鑑賞多元文化之能力') contributes to international understanding and a culture of peace, indirectly supporting this goal.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops skills for international communication and participation in international affairs, which are foundational for fostering global partnerships and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
